items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for form templates by service type, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not include any concrete API reads or checks related to the form templates, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific evidence addressing the requirement, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is met or if there is a gap.
